name: Group
visual_summary: The Group component is used to group and align child elements together. It wraps multiple elements with common layout and styling requirements. A developer would use it to arrange related UI elements in a consistent and responsive manner.
generation_prompt:

Description: The Group component is used to group and align child elements together. It wraps multiple elements with common layout and styling requirements. A developer would use it to arrange related UI elements in a consistent and responsive manner.

- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
